# At-Home Diagnostics — Stage 1: Symptom Awareness & Test Selection — L1 Capability Map

**Domain:** At-Home Diagnostics — Stage 1: Symptom Awareness & Test Selection
**Industry:** Med-Tech / Healthcare (Abbott Enterprise)
**Lens:** Business + IT (Both)
**Date:** 2026-03-18
**Generated by:** Capability Mapper v1.3 (Mode B — Journey-First)
**Journey Source:** At-Home Diagnostic Testing Journey Map (image input)

> **Scope:** Capabilities required to support the consumer at Stage 1 of the at-home diagnostics journey — from first symptom awareness through test selection and purchase decision.
> Abbott boundaries applied: Privacy standalone (CPO/excluded from this map), OEC standalone (excluded), Regulatory Affairs standalone (excluded).
> Stage 1 journey anchor: Consumer experiences symptoms → searches for testing options → selects and purchases a test.

---

## Journey Context — Stage 1

| Stage | Key Touchpoints | Consumer Goal |
|---|---|---|
| Symptom Awareness | Search engines, symptom checkers, HCP referral, social media | "Do I need to test? What test do I need?" |
| Test Selection | Product pages, comparison tools, reviews, pharmacy/e-commerce | "Which Abbott test is right for me and where do I get it?" |
| Purchase Decision | Cart, checkout, insurance lookup, FSA/HSA eligibility | "Buy the right test at the right price with confidence." |

🗺️ All capabilities below are anchored to Stage 1 touchpoints.

---

## MAP A — Business Capability View

### Primary Activities
*Capabilities that directly serve the consumer during symptom awareness and test selection*

> ⚡ High/Med/Low = digital intensity · 🎯 Edge = differentiating, Core = essential, Commodity = table stakes · 👁 Business/IT/Dual = ownership

**1.** 🔍 **Consumer Symptom & Condition Education**
Delivers accessible, medically accurate information helping consumers understand their symptoms, determine testing relevance, and build confidence in the decision to test.
⚡ High · 🎯 Core · 👁 Dual
🗺️ Journey anchor: Symptom Awareness — search and symptom checker touchpoints

**2.** 🧪 **Test Product Selection & Guidance**
Enables consumers to identify the right diagnostic test for their condition through comparison tools, use-case guidance, and decision support content.
⚡ High · 🎯 Edge · 👁 Dual
🗺️ Journey anchor: Test Selection — product page and comparison touchpoints

**3.** 🏪 **Omnichannel Availability & Channel Routing**
Ensures consumers can find and purchase the right test across retail pharmacy, e-commerce, and DTC channels — with clear routing to the nearest or preferred channel.
⚡ High · 🎯 Core · 👁 Dual
🗺️ Journey anchor: Purchase Decision — channel selection and cart initiation

**4.** 💳 **Purchase Accessibility & Affordability**
Reduces purchase friction through FSA/HSA eligibility surfacing, insurance lookup, coupon/savings programs, and transparent pricing across channels.
⚡ Med · 🎯 Edge · 👁 Business
🗺️ Journey anchor: Purchase Decision — checkout and pricing touchpoints

**5.** 📣 **Awareness & Demand Generation**
Builds consumer awareness of at-home testing options through paid media, organic search optimization, HCP referral programs, and public health partnerships.
⚡ High · 🎯 Core · 👁 Dual

### Support Activities
*Capabilities that govern and sustain Stage 1 consumer experience*

**6.** 📐 **Regulatory & Claims Governance**
Ensures all consumer-facing symptom education, product claims, and marketing content meets FDA, FTC, and applicable regulatory standards for diagnostic product promotion.
⚡ Med · 🎯 Core · 👁 Business

**7.** 🔗 **Retail & Channel Partner Management**
Manages relationships, content syndication, and sell-through enablement with retail pharmacy chains, e-commerce platforms, and distribution partners.
⚡ Med · 🎯 Core · 👁 Business

**8.** 📊 **Consumer Insights & Decision Analytics**
Captures and analyzes consumer behavior data at Stage 1 — search intent, product page engagement, comparison patterns — to optimize content and conversion.
⚡ High · 🎯 Edge · 👁 Dual

---

## MAP B — IT Capability View

### Primary Activities
*Technology capabilities that directly enable Stage 1 consumer experience*

> ⚡ High/Med/Low = digital intensity · 🎯 Edge = differentiating, Core = essential, Commodity = table stakes · 👁 Business/IT/Dual = ownership

**1.** 🌐 **Consumer Digital Experience Platform**
Core web and app platform delivering symptom education content, product pages, test comparison tools, and purchase pathways across D2C and retail digital touchpoints.
⚡ High · 🎯 Core · 👁 IT
🗺️ Journey anchor: Symptom Awareness + Test Selection — all digital touchpoints

**2.** 🤖 **AI-Powered Symptom Guidance & Test Recommendation**
Conversational or rule-based AI layer that maps consumer-reported symptoms to appropriate test recommendations — reducing decision friction and increasing test-fit confidence.
⚡ High · 🎯 Edge · 👁 Dual
🗺️ Journey anchor: Symptom Awareness — symptom checker and decision support

**3.** 🛒 **E-Commerce & DTC Commerce Platform**
Platform managing product catalog, cart, checkout, and purchase fulfillment for direct-to-consumer diagnostic test sales — including FSA/HSA payment processing.
⚡ High · 🎯 Core · 👁 IT
🗺️ Journey anchor: Purchase Decision — cart and checkout

**4.** 🔎 **Search & Content Discoverability**
SEO infrastructure, structured data, and search-optimized content delivery ensuring Abbott diagnostic products surface when consumers search for testing options.
⚡ High · 🎯 Core · 👁 IT
🗺️ Journey anchor: Symptom Awareness — search engine touchpoints

**5.** 📦 **Retail Channel Integration & Content Syndication**
Integration layer pushing accurate product content, pricing, and availability data to retail pharmacy and third-party e-commerce platforms (Amazon, Walmart.com, CVS.com).
⚡ High · 🎯 Core · 👁 IT
🗺️ Journey anchor: Test Selection + Purchase Decision — retail channel touchpoints

### Support Activities
*Technology capabilities that sustain the Stage 1 platform ecosystem*

**6.** 📊 **Consumer Analytics & Conversion Optimization**
Behavioral analytics platform tracking Stage 1 funnel metrics — awareness → consideration → test selection → purchase — with A/B testing and personalization capabilities.
⚡ High · 🎯 Edge · 👁 Dual

**7.** 🔐 **Consumer Identity & Data Privacy Infrastructure**
Identity management and consent framework for consumer-facing digital touchpoints — enabling personalization while meeting HIPAA-adjacent, CCPA, and GDPR obligations.
⚡ High · 🎯 Core · 👁 IT

**8.** 🔗 **MarTech & Campaign Integration**
Integration connecting consumer digital experience to marketing automation, CRM, and paid media platforms — enabling retargeting, lifecycle campaigns, and awareness measurement.
⚡ Med · 🎯 Core · 👁 IT

---

📌 Org Context Note

This map reflects Med-Tech enterprise defaults for a global at-home diagnostics consumer business.
Boundaries assumed: Privacy is a standalone CPO function (excluded); OEC is standalone (excluded); Regulatory Affairs is a standalone primary domain (excluded but governs claims governance capability); BTS is the centralized IT function delivering these capabilities.
Adjust if: DTC commerce is run by a separate digital commerce team — several IT capabilities would shift lens from IT to Dual.
Adjust if: Symptom checker / AI recommendation is aspirational at Abbott — downgrade AI-Powered Symptom Guidance from Competitive Edge to Core Capability target and flag as a GenAI opportunity.

---

🔎 Completeness Check

Wide scan zones covered (IT lens — all 8):
- Platform & Tooling: ✓ Consumer Digital Experience Platform, E-Commerce & DTC Platform
- Data & Analytics: ✓ Consumer Analytics & Conversion Optimization
- Knowledge Management: ⚠️ No standalone L1 — product content and symptom education managed within Digital Experience Platform. Elevate if content management is a known pain point.
- Workflow & Process Automation: ✓ AI-Powered Symptom Guidance (recommendation engine workflow)
- Integration & API Management: ✓ Retail Channel Integration & Content Syndication, MarTech & Campaign Integration
- Infrastructure & Security: ✓ Consumer Identity & Data Privacy Infrastructure
- Vendor & Spend Management: ✓ Retail & Channel Partner Management (Business map); IT coverage within Retail Channel Integration
- User Experience & Adoption: ✓ Consumer Digital Experience Platform, Search & Content Discoverability

Capabilities I considered but excluded:
- Inventory & Availability Management — excluded; downstream of Stage 1 (purchase fulfillment is Stage 2+)
- HCP Referral Platform — excluded; HCP-facing capability, not consumer-facing at Stage 1. Elevate if HCP-to-consumer referral is a primary acquisition channel.
- Insurance Claims Processing — excluded; Stage 3+ (post-purchase, reimbursement flow)

Domain watchlist flags triggered:
- AI-Powered Symptom Guidance kept separate from general Digital Experience ✓
- E-Commerce kept separate from Retail Channel Integration ✓
- Consumer Analytics kept separate from MarTech ✓

Recommendation: Validate whether AI-Powered Symptom Guidance (e.g., symptom checker, "which test?" tool) is live or aspirational at Abbott ARDx. If live, confirm whether it runs on Mia or a separate consumer-facing engine — architecture and lens assignment may differ.

---
